user_query:
I need a small, repeatable command-line workflow that fetches and summarizes recent release notes for key antibiotic resistance resources so I can be notified and plan follow-ups. Please use the configuration file at input/sources.yaml to drive which official sources to check (only those listed; do not add others). Identify each target page by the official organization and domain patterns specified in the config (e.g., CARD on the card.mcmaster.ca domain, NCBI AMRFinderPlus on the ncbi.nlm.nih.gov or the official NCBI AMR code repository domain, and ResFinder on the CGE/DTU domain). Do not hardcode full URLs into the config; resolve the appropriate official release notes/news/changelog page for each source based on the domain patterns and hints.

Requirements:
- Provide a single shell entrypoint named run_update_digest.sh at the workspace root that, when executed, will:
  1) Download each target webpage to workspace/webpages/{source_id}.html (one file per source_id from the config).
  2) Extract up to the 5 most recent update items from each saved HTML page (e.g., dated entries, release notes, changelog items). Capture an item’s date string if present, a concise title/summary, and a direct item URL if available.
  3) Write a normalized CSV to workspace/output/arg_update_digest.csv with the exact header columns: source,item_rank,date,title,item_url,retrieved_at_utc. Use item_rank starting at 1 for the most recent item per source.
  4) Write a JSON file to workspace/output/follow_up_tasks.json that contains an array of objects for items dated within the last 60 days (based on the date string parsed from the page). Each object must have: source (string), title (string), reference_url (string), date (ISO 8601 if parsed, otherwise exclude the item), suggested_action (string). Use the suggested_action: "Review and update local ARG reference for <source>".
  5) Write a plain-text fetch log to workspace/output/fetch.log that records one line per source with an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp, source_id, the resolved page URL fetched, and the HTTP status (or an error message if fetch fails).
- Save all outputs under the exact paths above. If a page cannot be fetched or parsed, still produce the CSV and JSON files with whatever data is available and include the failure in fetch.log.
- The extraction should be based on visible update/release entries on the resolved official pages and should not rely on any private services. Keep everything runnable locally from the shell.

Deliverables to verify:
- run_update_digest.sh (shell entrypoint that orchestrates the workflow by running your code or commands).
- workspace/webpages/{card,amrfinderplus,resfinder}.html (raw pages, one per source_id as configured).
- workspace/output/arg_update_digest.csv (with the specified header and rows aggregated from all sources).
- workspace/output/follow_up_tasks.json (only items within the last 60 days; may be an empty array if none qualify).
- workspace/output/fetch.log (one line per attempted fetch with timestamp, source_id, resolved URL, and status). All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
